settings.label: Add offset to:
settings.info: If set to main, top offset will be added to the <main> tag. If set to First Section, top offset will be added to the first section.

settings.label: External Scripts (Header)
settings.info: You can insert external scripts like Marker.io widget to this input.

settings.label: Light Text
settings.info: Dark text color that will be used on light themes.

settings.label: Dark Text
settings.info: Light text color that will be used on dark themes.

definition.label: Gradient
definition.info: Background gradient replaces background where possible.
